name: Forklift from defective part crushed me, sue manufacturer?
description: Yes, sue maker for defects—extra to comp benefits.

mainEntity.name: Forklift from defective part crushed me, sue manufacturer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue maker for defects—extra to comp benefits.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, product liability claim beyond workers' comp.** $5.3M verdict example.[4] Key factors: Prove design/manufacturing defect; history of issues. Expert analysis needed. Attorney files against maker for full damages.
